changelog: Fix server issues and improve stability
Replaced Favorites with Wishlist for better naming consistency
Added favorite anime section for quick access to followed series
Fix update dialog and navigation overlap issues
Minor bug fixes and performance improvements
Added bottom navigation
Introduced watch history support
Direct playback from history
Improved overall UI and navigation flow
Enhanced episode browsing and pagination
Added Search history suggestions for faster access to previously searched anime
Fixed app versioning in about section
Improved skeleton loaders in white theme
First public release
Search and stream anime episodes
Quality selector and server switching
PiP (Picture-in-Picture) support for background playback
Auto-next episode and watch progress saving
Proxy toggle for streaming
Light/Dark theme toggle
Modern UI with shimmer loading and error handling
